title: ENZYMES AND THEIR IMPORTANCE FOR THE HUMAN BODY
author: M.A. Kadyrov
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The article  "Enzymes and Their Importance for the Human Body"  explores the vital role enzymes play in maintaining physiological balance and ensuring the proper functioning of metabolic processes. It provides an overview of the classification, structure, and mechanisms of enzyme action, emphasizing their specificity and catalytic efficiency. Particular attention is given to the consequences of enzyme deficiency, including inherited and acquired enzymopathies, and their clinical manifestations. The article also highlights the diagnostic significance of enzyme activity in biological fluids and the application of enzymatic methods in modern medicine. The content underscores the essential nature of enzymes in health and disease, making them key targets in diagnostics and therapeutic strategies.

keywords: digestive and metabolic enzymes, amylase, protease, lipase.
